jsonLd.title: 99acres is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
